sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value = ALL (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id < 3);
SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL OR value = ALL (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id > 3);
SELECT MIN(value) as min_value, MAX(value) as max_value FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING min_value = ALL (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value = ALL (SELECT value FROM (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table GROUP BY id));
SELECT AVG(value) OVER (PARTITION BY id) as partition_avg FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND value = ALL (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id >= 5);
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 (id UInt32, value Nullable(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id FROM test_table_2 WHERE value = ALL (SELECT value FROM test_table_2 WHERE LENGTH(value) = 0);
SELECT value FROM test_table_2 WHERE value = ALL (SELECT value FROM (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table_2) WHERE id = 2);
